name: anvil finish-gate
description: anvil's OpenClaw integration: blocks finalizing while a claimed task lacks evidence (before_agent_finalize), auto-captures verification-command output to the claim's evidence buffer (after_tool_call), injects anvil usage guidance into the system prompt for tracked projects (before_prompt_build), and guards mutating tools against editing without an active claim (before_tool_call).

claimGuardMode.description: before_tool_call claim-guard behavior when a mutating tool runs with no active claim. warn (default): log only, never blocks. block: hard-veto the tool (CI/strict). require_approval: route to approval — DO NOT use in a headless gateway (no approver = hard block). off: disable.

guardExec.description: Also apply the claim-guard to exec/bash tools (default off — there is no command parser, so gating all exec would warn on read-only shell).
